---
title: "Adapter Framework"
subtitle: "The UIAO adapter execution framework -- lifecycle, sandboxing, and hot-swap"
---

::: {.callout-note}
## Page in preparation
Full documentation is being drafted. See the [Adapter Authoring Tutorial](adapter-authoring-tutorial.qmd) and the [Adapter Plane appendix](appendix/a-adapter-plane/index.qmd) for current coverage.
:::
